identity_baseline: A diverse collection of small, winged avian creatures.
stable_visual_summary: A heterogeneous group of small-scale birds characterized by diverse plumage and species. The collection includes identifiable types such as Magpies and Canaries, providing a mix of high-contrast black-and-white patterns and bright yellow tones within the group's collective visual footprint.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain a diverse mix of species (e.g., Magpies and Canaries) to satisfy the "various" descriptor.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific species composition beyond Magpies and Canaries is unknown.
evidence_summary: [source:C:/FilmCreator/projects/alice_in_wonderland/02_story_analysis/character_breakdowns/chapters/CH003/various_birds.md] Physical Description: A collection of small birds, including Magpies and Canaries.
